description: Returning-user Remember-Me flow: phone +14155550011 → OTP 123456 → saved institution list → account select → confirm → success. Skips bank search and credentials entry because the institution is pre-saved against this sandbox phone number.

institution.name: Tartan Bank
institution.rationale: Non-OAuth sandbox bank that consistently appears in the saved-institution list for phone +14155550011. Avoids Chase (ins_56, OAuth) which triggers OPEN_OAUTH and breaks automation.

screens.narrationHint: Maya enters her phone number, taps Continue.

actions._note: Plaid does NOT auto-submit on fill — confirmed in plaid-link-nav-learnings.md (2026-03-10). Click Continue explicitly.

screens.narrationHint: She enters the one-time code Plaid texted her.

actions._note: 1s post-fill pause keeps the filled digits visible in the recording. OTP auto-advances after fill — no Continue click needed (confirmed in CLAUDE.md).

screens.narrationHint: Plaid recognizes her — she picks her bank.

actions._note: 500ms pre-click pause is load-bearing — confirmed in CLAUDE.md. 2s produces a 1.5s-too-long section in the processed video.

oauthGuard._note: If clicking this institution emits OPEN_OAUTH, automation must abort and re-pick a non-OAuth institution. plaidSelectSavedInstitution() handles this via Promise.race.

actions._note: li[role='listitem'] is the clickable element — Plaid hides the actual checkbox input. Confirmed end-to-end 2026-03-10.

screens.narrationHint: She confirms and connects in seconds.

actions._note: 'Confirm' is the Remember Me flow's terminal CTA. The fallbacks cover variants observed across institution/SDK versions.
Save with Plaid screen appears after account confirmation in some sandbox flows. Dismissing it lets the success panel render.

arrivalSignals.selector: button:has-text('Finish without saving'), button:has-text('No thanks'), button:has-text('Skip')

actions._note: Recorder's plaidLinkWaitSuccess() owns the actual success detection (waits up to 45s for _plaidLinkComplete AND host advanced past launch step). This entry exists so the recipe accounts for the visible dwell after onSuccess fires.

_estimateBreakdown.total: ~11.5s, matches the narration time-budget the launch step expects

_notes: Built from confirmed-working selectors documented in CLAUDE.md and inputs/plaid-link-nav-learnings.md. Every selector here has shipped in a passing scripts/test-plaid-link-record.js run.

When Layer 2 executor lands and a run uses this recipe end-to-end without falling back to vision, the operator bumps `verifiedRuns` and stamps `lastVerifiedAt`. After 3 verifiedRuns this recipe is considered stable; selector drift on Plaid's side will surface as a vision fallback win and append to `candidateSelectors[]`.

Saved-institution-list 'firstSavedInstitution' uses 'ul li:first-of-type button' rather than name-matching so the recipe works across personas. Name match is in fallbackTargets in case Plaid swaps the order.
